title: ochyrorchis praestans var. umbrosa
intro: Ochyrorchis praestans var. umbrosa, also known as the shady or umbrella orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to China. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat fever, headache, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. Ochyrorchis praestans var. umbrosa is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and acting as an antiseptic agent. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it can be found in herbal preparations such as capsules or powders.
